General.Name: Biosino Bio-Technology and Science Incorporation
General.Description: Biosino Bio-Technology and Science Incorporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, sells, and distributes in-vitro diagnostic reagents in Mainland China. The company offers clinical chemistry reagents, including single and double reagents, calibrators, QC products, and washing solution detergents; Elisa kits; rapid tests; and analyzers. It also provides medical and medical inspection services; and produces and sells medical instruments. Biosino Bio-Technology and Science Incorporation Guangdong has a a strategic cooperation agreement with Xiaoshou Medical Technology Co., Ltd. Biosino Bio-Technology and Science Incorporation founded in 1988 and is based in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
